<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>감귤 장학생 포트폴리오</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@300;400;700;900&family=Bebas+Neue&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --red: #C62828;
    --green: #2E7D32;
    --orange: #F9A825;
    --black: #111;
    --white: #fafaf8;
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body {
    background:#1a1a1a;
    font-family:'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
    gap:0; padding:40px 20px;
  }
  .page {
    width:794px; height:1123px;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    margin-bottom:12px;
    box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .pgn {
    position:absolute;
    font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:3px; z-index:10;
  }

  /* ===== P1 COVER ===== */
  .p1 { background:var(--black); }
  .p1 .bg { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:0.72; }
  .p1 .ov { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(155deg,rgba(0,0,0,0.75) 0%,rgba(198,40,40,0.2) 55%,rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 100%); }
  .p1 .ct { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; padding:60px 64px; }
  .p1 .tag { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:6px; color:var(--orange); text-transform:uppercase; }
  .p1 .ttl { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:108px; line-height:0.92; color:var(--white); letter-spacing:2px; }
  .p1 .ttl span { display:block; }
  .p1 .ttl .r { color:var(--red); }
  .p1 .km { font-size:17px; font-weight:300; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); line-height:1.9; letter-spacing:1px; border-left:3px solid var(--orange); padding-left:20px; margin:18px 0 26px; }
  .p1 .sub { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px; color:var(--orange); text-transform:uppercase; }
  .p1 .bot { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end; }
  .p1 .botl { font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-style:italic; font-size:15px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }
  .p1 .yr { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:48px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.1); line-height:1; }

  /* ===== P2 CONCEPT ===== */
  .p2 { background:var(--cream); display:flex; }
  .p2 .lft { width:52%; padding:68px 46px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; }
  .p2 .lbl { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:6px; color:var(--red); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .p2 h2 { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:52px; line-height:1; color:var(--black); margin-bottom:26px; }
  .p2 .div { width:48px; height:3px; background:var(--red); margin-bottom:24px; }
  .p2 p { font-size:14px; line-height:2; color:#333; font-weight:300; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .p2 .kn { margin-top:32px; padding:18px 22px; border-left:4px solid var(--orange); background:rgba(249,168,37,0.08); font-size:13px; color:#555; font-style:italic; line-height:1.8; }
  .p2 .rgt { width:48%; position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .p2 .rgt img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; }
  .p2 .rgt::after { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(245,240,232,0.3) 0%,transparent 22%); }

  /* ===== P3 INGREDIENT ===== */
  .p3 { background:#f5a500; }
  .p3 img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; position:absolute; inset:0; }
  .p3 .ov { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(245,160,0,0.5) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,0.62) 100%); }
  .p3 .ct { position:absolute; inset:0; padding:54px 64px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; }
  .p3 .tl { font-size:11px; letter-spacing:8px; font-weight:700; color:var(--black); text-transform:uppercase; }
  .p3 .bt { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:116px; line-height:0.85; color:white; mix-blend-mode:overlay; opacity:0.9; }
  .p3 .bot { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-end; }
  .p3 .info h3 { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:46px; color:white; line-height:1; }
  .p3 .info p { font-size:13px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85); line-height:1.8; margin-top:8px; font-weight:300; }
  .p3 .info .kn { margin-top:12px; font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-style:italic; }
  .p3 .bdg { width:96px; height:96px; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid white; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:white; flex-shrink:0; }
  .p3 .bdg .pc { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:36px; line-height:1; }
  .p3 .bdg .lb { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:2px; opacity:0.8; }

  /* ===== P4 PROGRAM ===== */
  .p4 { background:var(--black); }
  .p4 .bg { width:100%; height:62%; object-fit:cover; position:absolute; top:0; opacity:0.8; }
  .p4 .ov { position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:62%; background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 30%,var(--black) 100%); }
  .p4 .ct { position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:36px 64px 56px; }
  .p4 .lbl { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:6px; color:var(--orange); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:14px; }
  .p4 h2 { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:60px; color:white; line-height:1; margin-bottom:18px; }
  .p4 p { font-size:14px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7); line-height:2; font-weight:300; max-width:480px; }
  .p4 .kn { margin-top:20px; font-size:13px; color:var(--orange); font-style:italic; }

  /* ===== P5 FARMING - FIXED ===== */
  .p5 { background:var(--white); }
  /* Image fills right half absolutely */
  .p5 .img-abs {
    position:absolute; top:0; right:0;
    width:50%; height:1123px;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .p5 .img-abs img {
    width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover;
  }
  .p5 .img-abs .vtag {
    position:absolute; top:50%; left:-20px;
    transform:translateY(-50%) rotate(-90deg);
    font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive;
    font-size:10px; letter-spacing:6px;
    color:var(--green); white-space:nowrap;
  }
  /* Text fills left half */
  .p5 .txt-abs {
    position:absolute; top:0; left:0;
    width:50%; height:1123px;
    padding:72px 44px 72px 60px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center;
  }
  .p5 .step { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:6px; font-weight:700; color:var(--green); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:16px; }
  .p5 h2 { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:70px; color:var(--black); line-height:0.9; margin-bottom:26px; }
  .p5 .div { width:40px; height:3px; background:var(--green); margin-bottom:22px; }
  .p5 p { font-size:14px; line-height:2; color:#444; font-weight:300; }
  .p5 .dt { margin-top:28px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; color:var(--green); font-weight:700; }
  .p5 .dt::before { content:''; display:block; width:22px; height:2px; background:var(--green); }
  .p5 .hl { margin-top:32px; padding:18px 22px; border-left:4px solid var(--green); background:rgba(46,125,50,0.06); font-size:14px; color:#333; font-style:italic; font-weight:700; line-height:1.6; }

  /* ===== P6 R&D ===== */
  .p6 { background:#1c1c1c; }
  .p6 img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:0.56; }
  .p6 .ov { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(198,40,40,0.28) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,0.74) 55%); }
  .p6 .bgt { position:absolute; top:10px; right:-10px; font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:210px; color:white; opacity:0.03; line-height:1; pointer-events:none; }
  .p6 .ct { position:absolute; inset:0; padding:64px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-end; }
  .p6 .step { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:6px; font-weight:700; color:var(--red); text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .p6 h2 { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:74px; color:white; line-height:0.9; margin-bottom:22px; }
  .p6 .div { width:48px; height:3px; background:var(--red); margin-bottom:20px; }
  .p6 p { font-size:15px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.78); line-height:2; font-weight:300; max-width:390px; margin-bottom:30px; }
  .p6 .hl { display:inline-block; padding:12px 24px; border:2px solid var(--red); color:var(--red); font-size:13px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; }

  /* ===== P7 OUTCOME ===== */
  .p7 { background:var(--cream); }
  .p7 .top { height:52%; background:var(--black); position:relative; overflow:hidden; }
  .p7 .top img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; object-position:top; opacity:0.8; }
  .p7 .top::after { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 40%,rgba(245,240,232,0.1) 100%); }
  .p7 .ottag { position:absolute; top:30px; left:64px; font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:6px; color:var(--orange); z-index:2; }
  .p7 .bot { padding:40px 64px 52px; }
  .p7 h2 { font-family:'Bebas Neue',cursive; font-size:66px; color:var(--black); line-height:0.9; margin-bottom:20px; }
  .p7 .div { width:48px; height:3px; background:var(--orange); margin-bottom:18px; }
  .p7 p { font-size:14px; color:#444; line-height:2; font-weight:300; max-width:480px; }
  .p7 .hl { margin-top:20px; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; color:#b37700; font-style:italic; }
  .p7 .tags { display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:20px; }
  .p7 .tc { padding:8px 16px; background:var(--black); color:white; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:2px; font-weight:700; }

  </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- PAGE 1 -->
<div class="page p1">
  <img class="bg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  <div class="ov"></div>
  <div class="ct">
    <div class="tag">감귤장학금 × 제주의 자연</div>
    <div>
      <div class="ttl">
        <span>토마토</span>
        <span>고사리</span>
        <span class="r">흑돼지</span>
      </div>
      <div class="km">같이 고민하고,<br>도전하며,<br>함께 성장하는 감귤 장학생</div>
      <div class="sub">제주의 자연, 제주인의 밥상</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bot">
      <div class="botl">레시피콘서트 수상자 멘토링</div>
      <div class="yr">2026</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;right:64px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2)">01</div>
</div>

<!-- PAGE 2 -->
<div class="page p2">
  <div class="lft">
    <div class="lbl">Project Overview</div>
    <h2>CONCEPT<br>&amp; STORY</h2>
    <div class="div"></div>
    <p>프랑스의 부야베스와 이탈리아식 스튜를<br>제주 식재료로 재해석한 로컬 퓨전 요리</p>
    <p>토마토, 고사리, 제주 돼지고기를 활용하여<br>깊고 진한 풍미를 완성하였다.</p>
    <div class="kn">"함께 고민하며 만들어낸 결과"<br>— 제주의 자연이 담긴 한 그릇</div>
  </div>
  <div class="rgt">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;left:46px;color:#bbb">02</div>
</div>

<!-- PAGE 3 -->
<div class="page p3">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  <div class="ov"></div>
  <div class="ct">
    <div class="tl">Local Ingredient</div>
    <div class="bt">JEJU<br>TOMATO</div>
    <div class="bot">
      <div class="info">
        <h3>제주산 토마토<br>100% 신선도</h3>
        <p>제주의 햇살과 화산토가 키운<br>최상품 토마토</p>
        <div class="kn">지역에서 시작되는 가치</div>
      </div>
      <div class="bdg">
        <div class="pc">100</div>
        <div class="lb">% JEJU</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;left:64px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35)">03</div>
</div>

<!-- PAGE 4 -->
<div class="page p4">
  <img class="bg" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  <div class="ov"></div>
  <div class="ct">
    <div class="lbl">Program Background</div>
    <h2>감귤장학금<br>홈커밍데이</h2>
    <p>미래 농산업 인재 네트워크 구축과<br>지역 기반 식문화 프로젝트 진행</p>
    <div class="kn">→ 함께 성장하는 시작점</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;right:64px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2)">04</div>
</div>

<!-- PAGE 5 - FARMING FIXED -->
<div class="page p5">
  <div class="img-abs">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <div class="vtag">STEP 01 · FARMING</div>
  </div>
  <div class="txt-abs">
    <div class="step">Step 01</div>
    <h2>FARM<br>ING</h2>
    <div class="div"></div>
    <p>직접 재배하고 수확하며<br>식재료의 가치를 경험하는 과정</p>
    <div class="dt">2026.07.19 — 2026.07.20</div>
    <div class="hl">"고민은 현장에서 시작된다"</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;left:60px;color:#ccc">05</div>
</div>

<!-- PAGE 6 -->
<div class="page p6">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
  <div class="ov"></div>
  <div class="bgt">R&amp;D</div>
  <div class="ct">
    <div class="step">Step 02</div>
    <h2>RECIPE<br>DEVELOP<br>MENT</h2>
    <div class="div"></div>
    <p>다양한 조리 실험을 통해<br>제주 식재료의 가능성을 확장</p>
    <div class="hl">도전이 새로운 가치를 만든다</div>
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;right:64px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2)">06</div>
</div>

<!-- PAGE 7 -->
<div class="page p7">
  <div class="top">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="">
    <div class="ottag">Step 03 · Outcome</div>
  </div>
  <div class="bot">
    <h2>OUT<br>COME</h2>
    <div class="div"></div>
    <p>농업, 가공, 경험을 연결한<br>6차 산업형 프로젝트 완성</p>
    <div class="hl">함께 성장한 결과</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <div class="tc">감귤장학생 9기</div>
      <div class="tc">레시피콘서트</div>
      <div class="tc">제주 로컬 퓨전</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pgn" style="bottom:28px;right:64px;color:#aaa">07</div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
